title: selago lacunosa
intro: Selago lacunosa, commonly known as Blue Devil's Claw or Cape Crested Carrot, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Selago lacunosa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Selago lacunosa can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile and valuable addition to herbal medicine.
